allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Item 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html' | Select-Object Length, Name")
PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; Write-Output "Total lines: $\($lines.Count\)"; $lines[200..350])

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; $line = $lines[187]; Write-Output "Line 188 length: $\($line.Length\)"; $line.Substring\(0, 3000\))

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; $line = $lines[187]; $idx = $line.IndexOf\(':root'\); Write-Output "Found :root at index: $idx"; $line.Substring\($idx, 3000\))

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; Write-Output "Total lines: $\($lines.Count\)"; Write-Output "Line 189 length: $\($lines[188].Length\)"; Write-Output "Line 190 length: $\($lines[189].Length\)"; Write-Output "Line 191 length: $\($lines[190].Length\)")

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; $line = $lines[187]; $idx = $line.IndexOf\('function App\('\); Write-Output "App function found at: $idx"; if \($idx -ge 0\) { $line.Substring\($idx, 5000\) })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; $line = $lines[187]; $idx = $line.IndexOf\('id=\\"root\\"'\); Write-Output "Root found at: $idx"; Write-Output "Total line length: $\($line.Length\)"; $line.Substring\($idx, 200\))

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; for \($i = 54; $i -lt 187; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i].Length -gt 100\) { Write-Output "Line $\($i+1\): length=$\($lines[$i].Length\) preview=$\($lines[$i].Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(100, $lines[$i].Length\)\)\)" } })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; $line = $lines[187]; $idx = $line.IndexOf\('id="root"'\); $endIdx = $line.IndexOf\('</style>'\); Write-Output "End of style at: $endIdx"; $endBody = $line.IndexOf\('</body>'\); Write-Output "End of body at: $endBody"; $htmlStart = $line.IndexOf\('<div id="app"'\); if \($htmlStart -lt 0\) { $htmlStart = $line.IndexOf\('function App'\); }; Write-Output "App/html start: $htmlStart")

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\ASA\\Downloads\\test \(1\)\\Mapping Tool - Standalone.html'; $line = $lines[187]; $idx = $line.IndexOf\(':root'\); $cssContent = $line.Substring\($idx, 40000\); Write-Output $cssContent.Length; $cssContent | Set-Content -Path 'C:\\Temp\\mapping_css.txt' -Encoding UTF8)
